title: Ellie DeVille
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Ellie DeVille''' was the letterer to the following comic books:

*''[[Heir to the Empire (Hardcover)]]''
*''[[Heir to the Empire (TPB)]]''
**[[Heir to the Empire 1|''Heir to the Empire'' 1]]
**[[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]]
**[[Heir to the Empire 3|''Heir to the Empire'' 3]]
**[[Heir to the Empire 4|''Heir to the Empire'' 4]]
**[[Heir to the Empire 5|''Heir to the Empire'' 5]]
**[[Heir to the Empire 6|''Heir to the Empire'' 6]]
*''[[Dark Force Rising (TPB)]]''
**[[Dark Force Rising 1|''Dark Force Rising'' 1]]
**[[Dark Force Rising 2|''Dark Force Rising'' 2]]
**[[Dark Force Rising 3|''Dark Force Rising'' 3]]
**[[Dark Force Rising 4|''Dark Force Rising'' 4]]
**[[Dark Force Rising 5|''Dark Force Rising'' 5]]
**[[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]]
*''[[The Last Command (TPB)]]''
**[[The Last Command 1|''The Last Command'' 1]]
**[[The Last Command 2|''The Last Command'' 2]]
**[[The Last Command 3|''The Last Command'' 3]]
**[[The Last Command 4|''The Last Command'' 4]]
**[[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]]
**[[The Last Command 6|''The Last Command'' 6]]
